channel.title: Posts on Yee Jian's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Yee Jian's Blog

item.title: Linux wired earphones white noise solution
How to set up printer in NUS Cinnamon College on Linux
item.description: A step-by-step guide to setting up printer using CUPS and its web interface in Cinnamon College.

item.title: SSH Jump
item.description: How to SSH Jump when you are outside the NUS Network.

item.title: Creating My First Pull Request
item.description: How I contributed the first time to GitLab, and what it meant to me.

item.title: Lessons learned writing the Source Stepper - Part 1
item.description: In this part, I will talk about what is the Source Language, what is the Source Stepper, and some prior knowledge to understanding how the Source Stepper Works.

item.title: CS2103 Software Engineering in Neovim - A Post Reflection
item.description: The lessons I learned after using both NeoVim and IntelliJ.

item.title: CS2103 Software Engineering in Neovim
item.description: My (old) setup trying out software engineering in Java on an editor, rather than IDE. Because why not?
